query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Good — I've found 4 of the 5 stored entries. All look high quality. Now building the retrospective briefing for Phase 2.

```
RETROSPECTIVE BRIEFING for crt-031
====================================

Sessions: 2, Records: 2560, Tool calls: ~1236, Duration: 3h 50m

HOTSPOTS (10 detected):
- [warning] compile_cycles: 98 compile/check cycles (threshold likely ~30). Peak: 15 in 5min at +195m. 36 clusters.
- [warning] context_load: Loaded 101 KB before first write/edit. 2 clusters in develop/1.
- [warning] file_breadth: Accessed 80 distinct files. Peak: 20 in 5min at +0m.
- [warning] mutation_spread: Mutations across 70 files. 11 clusters in scope/1.
- [warning] tool_failure_hotspot: context_get failed 38x, Read 14x, context_store 14x. 11 clusters.
- [info] edit_bloat: Avg Edit response 98.9 KB (2x typical, threshold 50 KB).
- [info] reread_rate: 58 files re-read multiple times.
- [info] design_artifact_count: 49 design artifacts created.
- [info] search_via_bash: 25.7% of Bash calls are search (87/338).
- [info] output_parsing_struggle: cargo build piped through 8 filters in 3 min.

BASELINE OUTLIERS:
- edit_bloat_total_kb: 7120.8 vs mean 1970.3 (1.7σ) — Outlier
- total_context_loaded_kb: 12262.4 vs mean 4094.2 (1.5σ) — Outlier

RECOMMENDATIONS FROM RETROSPECTIVE:
- [compile_cycles] Batch field additions before compiling — complete type definitions in-memory before each build to avoid cascading type errors across multiple struct changes

REWORK SIGNALS:
- design-review pass 1 FAIL: Vision alignment + synthesis needed rework before gate passed
- design had 2 passes: 1h 20m second pass (354 records)
- Scope expanded mid-session: boosted_categories de-hardcoding added after initial design (not in original scope)
```

Cascading struct field addition drives compile cycles: complete type definitions before first build
